name: Top 100 Stocks Test
description: Test case for retrieving the 100 most popular stocks on Robinhood through agent interaction

parts.text: List the 100 most popular stocks on Robinhood.

Here are the 100 most popular stocks on Robinhood:

The list shows 100 stocks ranked by popularity among Robinhood users. Each entry includes the ticker symbol, company name, and current price. Popular names typically include large-cap technology and consumer companies. The full list of 100 tickers is returned in popularity order.

**Note:** This is read-only discovery data reflecting current user popularity rankings. No orders were placed.
